Condition Report:
This bag is in excellent pre-owned condition, 98% like-new. Hardware remains bright and shiny with no fading. There is no wear or scuffing to the four corners of the bag. Please note that there are extremely minor surface scratches on the exterior leather, which are only visible when held against the light. Please examine all photos carefully before placing your order to confirm you are satisfied with the item's condition.
